customers_say: Customers find this water purifier to be a high-quality RO unit that makes daily usage simple and saves money in the long run. They appreciate its modern appearance, with one customer noting the touch panel with LED indicators, and another mentioning it stands out in the kitchen. The installation process receives positive feedback, and customers find the water tastes good. While many say it performs wonderfully, some report issues with it not working when there is no power.

reviews.author: Sushil Sakhuja
reviews.title: Best economic water purifier I have owned so far
reviews.body: I have purchased many water purifiers over the years, but none has given me the same level of satisfaction and peace of mind as this one. While there is always some scope for minor improvements and additional quality enhancements, I genuinely find this to be one of the best products in its category. In fact, I was so satisfied with its performance that I purchased it twice for two different flats. Its reliability, quality, and overall user experience have exceeded my expectations. My sincere thanks to the developers and the entire team behind this excellent product.

reviews.author: Manoj Joshi
reviews.title: Great Product, Great Service, Great Experience!
reviews.body: I am extremely satisfied with the Native M2 Pro Water Purifier by Urban Company. The water quality is excellent, the touch dispensing feature is very convenient, and the purifier looks premium in my kitchen. The installation process was smooth, and the product performance has been outstanding. A special thanks to Dawane Sir for the installation. He was punctual, professional, knowledgeable, and explained all the features and maintenance requirements clearly. The installation was completed neatly and efficiently, and he ensured everything was working perfectly before leaving. Highly recommended

reviews.author: bondili mahender singh
reviews.title: Highly Satisfied with Native M2 Pro Water Purifier
reviews.body: No spoken audio I recently purchased the Native M2 Pro Water Purifier by Urban Company, and my experience has been very positive. The product quality is excellent, and the water tastes clean and fresh after purification. One of the standout features is the smart app connectivity. The mobile app allows me to easily track water consumption, monitor filter health, and check the purifier's performance in real time. This feature provides added convenience and peace of mind, ensuring that the purifier is always functioning efficiently. The installation process was smooth, and the overall design is s

reviews.author: swapnil sharma
reviews.title: Satisfied with this purchase
reviews.body: After using the Native M2 Pro for a few weeks, I can say it feels much more advanced than traditional purifiers. Installation was smooth, and the technician explained all features clearly. The touch controls are easy to use, and preset dispensing is very handy in daily life. I also like checking water quality and filter life through the app. Most importantly, the water tastes cleaner and fresher. Overall, it has been a practical and satisfying upgrade.

reviews.author: Woxell
reviews.title: You Must Buy
reviews.body: Absolutely amazing RO purifier! The Native M2 Pro has exceeded my expectations in every way. The water taste is excellent, the 10-stage purification gives peace of mind, and the smart app monitoring feature is very useful for tracking filter health and water quality. The touch dispensing and bottle-fill modes make daily use super convenient. Installation was smooth, and the design looks premium in the kitchen. The 2-year no-service promise and unconditional warranty make it even more value for money. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a modern, reliable, and smart water purifier.
